description_long: This house features a stately, symmetrical facade with a central arched entryway framed by columns and flanked by large windows. The exterior is clad in light-colored brick or stone, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. The structure is two stories tall, with a flat roof and a prominent chimney rising from the center. On one side, there is a glass-enclosed sunroom or conservatory, adding a modern touch to the traditional design. The property is set on a rectangular plot with a manicured lawn and a paved walkway leading to the front steps. The rear and side elevations display a regular arrangement of windows, with the sunroom providing additional architectural interest.
description: A stately two-story house with a symmetrical brick facade, central arched entry, and a glass sunroom on one side, set on a manicured lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main arched entryway, symmetrical windows, and the paved walkway leading to the steps.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass sunroom/conservatory and the extended lawn area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a regular arrangement of windows and the full extent of the sunroom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain brick wall with windows and the walkway extending from the front.
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched doorway with steps, flanked by columns and decorative trim, leading to a paved walkway
